name: agent-semantic-interface
description: Semantic layer tooling for React-built webapps, with Next.js and generic React adapters.

scripts.scan:fixture: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/index.js scan --project tests/fixtures/fixture-app
scripts.compile:fixture: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/index.js compile --project tests/fixtures/fixture-app
scripts.validate:fixture: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/index.js validate --project tests/fixtures/fixture-app
scripts.diff:fixture: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/index.js diff --left tests/fixtures/fixture-app/asi-manifest.json --right tests/fixtures/fixture-app/asi-manifest.json
